title: Dashpanels
description: A mod adding modular control panels for redstone control.
body:
# Dashpanels

#### Mod adding control panels for more compact redstone controls
---
## Content
- #### Control Panel
    - Put modules onto this block by shift right clicking on it without an item in hand and having the modules in your inventory
- #### Control Cable
    - Use this block to connect panels to eachother and has a stripped form
- #### Stripped Cable
    - Connects to the control cable to take redstone inputs or outputs from the panels themselves
- #### Cable Stripper
    - Shift right click control cables or stripped cables to pick them up
    - Right click control cables to strip them
    - Right click stripped cables to change their configured module
- #### Quite a few cool modules for controlling redstone
---
## Compatibility
- #### [Computercraft](https://github.com/BoxxedDev/control-panels/wiki/ComputerCraft-Integration)
    - Control Panel can be a peripheral
- #### Create
    - Adds a new exclusive block for easier link connections
- #### Sable
    - Control Panels can be used aboard sublevels
- #### [Dye Depot](https://modrinth.com/mod/dye-depot)
    - Bulbs can be dyed to extra dyes added by dye depot (or any other dye mod)
---
#### Logo made by [JWX](https://www.artstation.com/jwx0001)
